chunks.heading: Jira integration
chunks.text: Jira can connect with API token settings, pull assigned issues, and map issue priority into workspace tasks. Sync keeps local tasks aligned with external tracking.

chunks.heading: Jira connection flow
chunks.text: Configure site URL and account email, connect with token, then run sync. If connection fails, verify URL format, credentials, and token scopes.

chunks.heading: OpenCode settings
chunks.text: Global settings include OpenCode enablement, default model, and settings directory. These values tune how Groove launches and cooperates with OpenCode workflows.
